instruction: Explain what kind of impact an XSS vulnerability can have.
input: Cross Site Scripting vulnerability found in NetScoutnGeniusOne v.6.3.4 allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via the creator parameter of the Alert Configuration page.
output: An XSS vulnerability allows an attacker to inject malicious scripts into web pages viewed by users, potentially leading to session hijacking, defacement, or the distribution of malware.
